title: Wroshyr (disambiguation)
content:
'''Wroshyr''' could refer to these things:

==Canon==
*The [[wroshyr tree]], native to [[Kashyyyk]]
**The [[white wroshyr tree]], a [[species]] of wroshyr trees
*[[Wroshyr wood]], harvested from the trees
*[[Wroshyr louse]], an insect that lived on the wroshyr trees
*[[Wroshyr lice syrup]], a syrup made from the wroshyr louse
*[[Wroshyr sap]], a sap made from the wroshyr tree
*[[Wroshyr Tree Cake]], a cake themed off of wroshyr trees
*[[Wrosha-grub]], an edible worm found on Kashyyyk
*[[Wroshite]], a crystal found on Kashyyyk

==Legends==
*The [[Wroshyr tree/Legends|wroshyr tree]], native to [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]
*[[Wroshyr wood/Legends|Wroshyr wood]], harvested from the trees
*The [[Wroshyr louse/Legends|wroshyr louse]], an insect that lived on the wroshyr trees
*[[Wroshyr lice syrup/Legends|Wroshyr lice syrup]], a syrup made from the wroshyr louse
*The [[Wroshyr (starship)|''Wroshyr'']], [[Chenlambec]]'s ship
*[[Wroshyr cavendish|''Wroshyr'' cavendish]], which could be [[Smoking/Legends|smoked]]
*An [[unidentified wroshyr tree]] which was dying during the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]]

{{Disambig}}
